title: Steering Claude Code: CLAUDE.md files, skills, hooks, rules, subagents and more
preview: There are seven methods for instructing Claude's behavior: CLAUDE.md files, rules, skills, subagents, hooks, output styles, and appending the system prompt.

blocks.english: Seven methods for delivering instructions
blocks.chinese: 传递指令的七种方法

blocks.english: Claude is built to work the way you work, and in Claude Code you can customize it.
blocks.chinese: Claude 致力于按照你的方式工作，在 Claude Code 中你可以对其进行自定义。

blocks.english: There are seven methods for instructing Claude's behavior: CLAUDE.md files, rules, skills, subagents, hooks, output styles, and appending the system prompt.
blocks.chinese: 有七种方法可以指导 Claude 的行为：CLAUDE.md 文件、规则、Skills、子智能体、钩子、输出样式和追加系统提示。

blocks.english: Each method controls: when an instruction loads into context; whether it persists through long sessions (compaction behavior); and how much authority it carries.
blocks.chinese: 每种方法控制：指令何时加载到上下文中；是否在长会话中持续存在（压缩行为）；以及它承载多少权威性。

blocks.english: The table below provides a quick summary of key differences across each method while the post provides additional detail and decision framework for determining where each of your Claude instructions belongs.
blocks.chinese: 下表提供了每种方法关键差异的快速总结，而文章则提供了额外的细节和决策框架，用于确定每条 Claude 指令应归属何处。

blocks.english: CLAUDE.md files
blocks.chinese: CLAUDE.md 文件

blocks.english: CLAUDE.md is a markdown file at the root of your project. It loads into context at session start and stays there for the entire session.
blocks.chinese: CLAUDE.md 是项目根目录下的一个 markdown 文件。它在会话开始时加载到上下文中，并在整个会话期间保留。

blocks.english: Build commands, directory layout, monorepo structure, coding conventions, and team norms all fit naturally here.
blocks.chinese: 构建命令、目录布局、monorepo 结构、编码规范和团队规范都自然地适合放在这里。

blocks.english: There are two types, and they load differently: Always loaded - root CLAUDE.md files; On-demand - CLAUDE.md files in subdirectories.
blocks.chinese: 有两种类型，它们的加载方式不同：始终加载——根目录 CLAUDE.md 文件；按需加载——子目录中的 CLAUDE.md 文件。

blocks.english: In a shared repository, CLAUDE.md grows the way any unowned config file does: every team appends its own instructions and nothing gets deleted.
blocks.chinese: 在共享仓库中，CLAUDE.md 会像任何无主的配置文件一样增长：每个团队都会追加自己的指令，而没有任何内容会被删除。

blocks.english: Tip: Keep CLAUDE.md under 200 lines, give it an owner, and review changes to it like code.
blocks.chinese: 提示：保持 CLAUDE.md 在 200 行以内，指定所有者，并像审查代码一样审查对其的更改。

blocks.english: Rules
blocks.chinese: 规则

blocks.english: Rules are markdown files in .claude/rules/ that give Claude specific constraints or conventions.
blocks.chinese: 规则是 .claude/rules/ 中的 markdown 文件，为 Claude 提供特定的约束或约定。

blocks.english: Unscoped rules behave like CLAUDE.md in that they are always loaded at session start and get re-injected on compaction.
blocks.chinese: 无作用域规则的行为类似于 CLAUDE.md，它们总是在会话开始时加载，并在压缩时重新注入。

blocks.english: Path-scoped rules allow you to load rule instructions only when they are relevant by adding a paths field.
blocks.chinese: 路径作用域规则允许你仅当相关时才加载规则指令，通过添加 paths 字段来实现。

blocks.english: Skills
blocks.chinese: Skills

blocks.english: Skills live in .claude/skills/ as folders of instructions, scripts, and resources that Claude loads dynamically.
blocks.chinese: Skills 作为指令、脚本和资源的文件夹位于 .claude/skills/ 中，由 Claude 动态加载。

blocks.english: Only the name and description load at session start; the full body loads when Claude invokes the skill.
blocks.chinese: 只有名称和描述在会话开始时加载；完整内容在 Claude 调用该 Skill 时加载。

blocks.english: Tip: Instructions that are procedural, like deploy workflows, release checklists, or review processes, belong in a skill rather than in CLAUDE.md.
blocks.chinese: 提示：流程性的指令，如部署工作流、发布清单或审查流程，应放在 Skill 中而非 CLAUDE.md 中。

blocks.english: Subagents
blocks.chinese: 子智能体

blocks.english: Subagents are markdown files in .claude/agents/ that define isolated assistants for specific side tasks.
blocks.chinese: 子智能体是 .claude/agents/ 中的 markdown 文件，为特定辅助任务定义独立的助手。

blocks.english: Subagents are similar to skills in that the name, description, and tool list load at session start, but the larger context within the body of the agent does not auto-invoke.
blocks.chinese: 子智能体与 Skills 类似，名称、描述和工具列表在会话开始时加载，但 agent 主体中的较大上下文不会自动调用。

blocks.english: The subagent then runs in its own fresh context window, and the only thing that returns to your main session is the subagent's final message plus metadata.
blocks.chinese: 子智能体然后在其自己的全新上下文窗口中运行，返回主会话的只有子智能体的最终消息及其元数据。

blocks.english: Tip: Use a subagent when a side task like deep search, a log analysis pass, or a dependency audit would clutter your main conversation.
blocks.chinese: 提示：当深度搜索、日志分析或依赖审计等辅助任务会使主会话变得杂乱时，使用子智能体。

blocks.english: Hooks
blocks.chinese: 钩子

blocks.english: Hooks are user-defined commands, HTTP endpoints, or LLM prompts that provide more deterministic control over Claude's behavior.
blocks.chinese: 钩子是用户定义的命令、HTTP 端点或 LLM 提示，用于对 Claude 的行为提供更确定性的控制。

blocks.english: You register hooks in settings.json, managed policy settings, or skill/agent frontmatter.
blocks.chinese: 你可以在 settings.json、托管策略设置或 skill/agent 前置元数据中注册钩子。

blocks.english: Tip: Use hooks for anything that should happen deterministically: running linters after edits, posting to Slack on completion, or blocking specific commands.
blocks.chinese: 提示：使用钩子处理任何应该确定性地发生的事情：编辑后运行 linter、完成后发布到 Slack 或阻止特定命令。

blocks.english: Output styles
blocks.chinese: 输出样式

blocks.english: Output styles are files in .claude/output-styles/ that inject instructions into the system prompt.
blocks.chinese: 输出样式是 .claude/output-styles/ 中的文件，用于向系统提示注入指令。

blocks.english: Because they sit in the system prompt, output styles carry the highest instruction-following weight.
blocks.chinese: 由于它们位于系统提示中，输出样式具有最高的指令遵循权重。

blocks.english: Tip: Before writing a custom output style, check the built-in styles. Proactive, Explanatory, and Learning cover the most common needs.
blocks.chinese: 提示：在编写自定义输出样式之前，请检查内置样式。Proactive、Explanatory 和 Learning 涵盖了最常见的需求。

blocks.english: Appending the system prompt
blocks.chinese: 追加系统提示

blocks.english: An alternative to modifying output styles is the append-system-prompt flag. It is only additive to the original system prompt.
blocks.chinese: 修改输出样式的替代方案是 append-system-prompt 标志。它仅对原始系统提示进行追加。

blocks.english: Tip: Appending the system prompt is best for adding specific coding standards, output formatting, or domain-specific knowledge.
blocks.chinese: 提示：追加系统提示最适合添加特定的编码标准、输出格式或领域特定知识。

blocks.english: Quick tips for Claude Code customization
blocks.chinese: Claude Code 自定义快速提示

blocks.english: If you find yourself doing one of the following, you may want to consider an alternative location for your instructions.
blocks.chinese: 如果你发现自己做了以下某件事，你可能需要考虑将指令放在其他地方。

blocks.english: Getting started
blocks.chinese: 开始使用

blocks.english: You can find more tips and patterns for getting the most out of Claude Code in our best practices for Claude Code documentation.
blocks.chinese: 你可以在我们的 Claude Code 最佳实践文档中找到更多关于充分利用 Claude Code 的技巧和模式。
